comments.author: chatgpt-codex-connector
comments.body:
Codex usage limits have been reached for code reviews. Please check with the admins of this repo to increase the limits by adding credits.
Credits must be used to enable repository wide code reviews.

comments.author: akshatvishu
comments.body:
> One non-blocking thing worth a runtime confirmation before/after merge: the two direct loaders' unit test uses a fake param, so it verifies the mapper is _called_ but not that the mapped `.attn.{k,v}_scale` names resolve to registered params on a real quantized checkpoint. If a maintainer has an FP8 checkpoint handy, a quick load smoke on MammothModa2 / MiMo-Audio would fully close it. Coordinates with #4808 (DiT transformer) to cover all 5 call sites.

I could only find <https://huggingface.co/feizhai123/hunyuan-image3-modelopt-fp8>  fp8 checkpoint but I don't have the GPU capacity required by it to test :(  .

reviews.author: lishunyang12
reviews.body:
Reviewed the diff — this is the correct upstream migration and the right fix for #4809. LGTM, recommend merge.

- Direct loaders (`mammoth_moda2`, `mimo_audio`) apply `get_cache_scale_mapper().apply(weights)` before the load loop — correct, since they bypass the outer `AutoWeightsLoader`.
- Delegated loaders (`hunyuan_image3` AR, `qwen2_old`) drop the manual branch and rely on the outer `AutoWeightsLoader`, which now maps `.output_scale` → `.attn.{k,v}_scale` upstream. `qwen2_old` previously used a `getattr` guard (so it degraded silently rather than crashing), so removing it is a clean-up, not a behavior regression.
- +1 on keeping the regression test — it's a cheap guard against the removed API creeping back in.

One non-blocking thing worth a runtime confirmation before/after merge: the two direct loaders' unit test uses a fake param, so it verifies the mapper is *called* but not that the mapped `.attn.{k,v}_scale` names resolve to registered params on a real quantized checkpoint. If a maintainer has an FP8 checkpoint handy, a quick load smoke on MammothModa2 / MiMo-Audio would fully close it. Coordinates with #4808 (DiT transformer) to cover all 5 call sites.
